---
title: "Evaluation: A Systematic Approach"
description: "Book overview and chapter study-note index for Evaluation: A Systematic Approach."
book_id: "evaluation-systematic-approach"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "rossi_lipsey_freeman_2004_evaluation_systematic_approach"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch01-chapter-1-an-overview-of-program-evaluation:c0027"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch02-chapter-2-tailoring-evaluations:c0002"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch03-chapter-3-identifying-issues-and-formulating-questions:c0054"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch04-chapter-4-assessing-the-need-for-a-program:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch05-chapter-5-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch06-chapter-6-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process:c0002"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch07-chapter-7-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch08-chapter-8-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch09-chapter-9-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch10-chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch11-chapter-11-measuring-efficiency:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch12-chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Evaluation: A Systematic Approach

Study notes on *Evaluation: A Systematic Approach* [@rossi_lipsey_freeman_2004_evaluation_systematic_approach]. These chapter notes are generated from source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>12 chapter notes</span>
  <span>2004</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
  <span>MCP evaluation-texts</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across these chapter notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Full reading route for all 12 chapters.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the full chapter set.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2004</span><span>Book overview</span><span>Chapter route</span></div>

This index summarises generated study notes for Peter H. Rossi, Mark W. Lipsey, and Howard E. Freeman's *Evaluation: A Systematic Approach* [@rossi_lipsey_freeman_2004_evaluation_systematic_approach]. The generated pages use selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Evaluation design should move from need and program theory through process, outcome, impact, efficiency, and use, with each question type matched to program circumstances and feasible evidence.

## Chapter Notes

- [Chapter 1: An Overview of Program Evaluation](chapter-01-an-overview-of-program-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 12-38
- [Chapter 2: Tailoring Evaluations](chapter-02-tailoring-evaluations.qmd) - source pages 38-67
- [Chapter 3: Identifying Issues and Formulating Questions](chapter-03-identifying-issues-and-formulating-questions.qmd) - source pages 67-93
- [Chapter 4: Assessing the Need for a Program](chapter-04-assessing-the-need-for-a-program.qmd) - source pages 93-120
- [Chapter 5: Expressing and Assessing Program Theory](chapter-05-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory.qmd) - source pages 120-150
- [Chapter 6: Assessing and Monitoring Program Process](chapter-06-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process.qmd) - source pages 150-177
- [Chapter 7: Measuring and Monitoring Program Outcomes](chapter-07-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes.qmd) - source pages 177-202
- [Chapter 8: Assessing Program Impact: Randomized Field Experiments](chapter-08-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments.qmd) - source pages 202-229
- [Chapter 9: Assessing Program Impact: Alternative Designs](chapter-09-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs.qmd) - source pages 229-258
- [Chapter 10: Detecting, Interpreting, and Analyzing Program Effects](chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects.qmd) - source pages 258-283
- [Chapter 11: Measuring Efficiency](chapter-11-measuring-efficiency.qmd) - source pages 283-315
- [Chapter 12: The Social Context of Evaluation](chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 315-358

## Legacy Extracts

- [Tailoring Evaluations](section-01-tailoring-evaluations.qmd)
- [Identifying Issues and Formulating Questions](section-02-formulating-questions.qmd)
- [Expressing and Assessing Program Theory](section-03-program-theory-assessment.qmd)

## Source Chunks

<details class="source-chunks">
<summary>Source chunks</summary>
<ul class="source-chunk-list">
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch01-chapter-1-an-overview-of-program-evaluation:c0027</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch02-chapter-2-tailoring-evaluations:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch03-chapter-3-identifying-issues-and-formulating-questions:c0054</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch04-chapter-4-assessing-the-need-for-a-program:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch05-chapter-5-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch06-chapter-6-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch07-chapter-7-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch08-chapter-8-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch09-chapter-9-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch10-chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch11-chapter-11-measuring-efficiency:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch12-chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
</ul>
</details>

## References
